hero.title: Research Assistant
hero.description: Collect research topics, organize manual notes, save references, and track progress in one focused workspace.

differences.title: Research organization without AI in V1
differences.description: Research Assistant V1 keeps research structured and intentionally manual.

items.title: Topic first
items.description: Start with a research topic and the question you want to explore.

items.title: Manual notes
items.description: Capture findings directly without summarization engines or external services.

items.title: Reference tracking
items.description: Save useful links and context alongside the research topic.

feel.title: A small workspace for focused research
feel.description: The experience keeps attention on one topic, its notes, references, and progress status.

items.title: Create the topic
items.description: Name the research area and define the guiding question.

items.title: Capture notes
items.description: Add concise notes as you work through the topic.

items.title: Track progress
items.description: Move the topic from collecting to reviewing to complete.

audiences.title: Who uses Research Assistant
audiences.description: Useful whenever research needs a simple place to stay organized.

items.title: Students
items.description: Collect notes and sources for assignments or projects.

items.title: Self learners
items.description: Organize topics and references while studying independently.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Track research findings for decisions, briefs, and planning.

resourceSection.title: Research foundation essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep topics, notes, references, and progress together as one reviewable record.

items.title: Research topic
items.description: Store the title, question, summary, and progress status.

items.title: Notes
items.description: Add ordered findings that belong to the topic.

items.title: References
items.description: Save source titles, links, and context notes.

groupedSection.title: A simple research workflow
groupedSection.description: Move from a rough topic to an organized research record in a short flow.

items.name: Topic
items.description: Add the subject you want to research.

items.name: Notes
items.description: Capture the findings in clear ordered parts.

items.name: Status
items.description: Mark progress as collecting, reviewing, or complete.

technicalSection.title: Built as a foundation mini app
technicalSection.description: Research Assistant follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: No AI, external APIs, crawling, or summarization in V1.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize research?
finalCta.description: Open Research Assistant and start with the topic you want to explore.
